category_sources: Official project page at https://read.seas.harvard.edu/~kohler/ipsumdump/ says ipsumdump reads packet sources and summarizes them into line-based ASCII output.
source_facts.description says ipsumdump summarizes TCP/IP dump files into a self-describing ASCII format.
display_name_sources: Official project page at https://read.seas.harvard.edu/~kohler/ipsumdump/ uses the name Ipsumdump/ipsumdump.
docs_sources: Official project page links to the ipsumdump manual page at https://read.seas.harvard.edu/~kohler/ipsumdump/man.html.
source_facts.homepage is the official project page.
repo_sources: Official project page lists downloads and manual pages, not a source-control repository.
source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and source_facts.source-archive provide an official release tarball but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official manual at https://read.seas.harvard.edu/~kohler/ipsumdump/man.html documents reading tcpdump files, live interfaces, packet fields, and ASCII summaries.
